extortion.description: gee.be zoominfo.com/c/thg/1212983204 Focus on your business, stay a step ahead of events, keep on the right track. thg is here to guide and advise you. The word digitalisation can be scary. Yet it offers some interesting perspectives, particularly in the fields of tax advice and accountancy. Simon Boskin, Partner at thg Luxembourg, talks about the numerous opportunities that the digital revolution offers our clients during an interview that appeared in our last newsletter. A must-read, as well as other current topics
